headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Texas Instruments (TXN) After Its Rapid Share Price Surge
summary: If you are asking whether Texas Instruments at US$295.17 is still a good deal or already pricing in a lot of optimism, you are asking the right question before looking at any charts or headlines. The stock has recorded returns of 5.0% over the last 7 days, 37.5% over the last 30 days, 66.3% year to date, 61.2% over 1 year, 97.2% over 3 years, and 90.2% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about how much future upside or risk is now reflected in the price. Recent price moves have...
